tasks.title: error_handling: 31 variants in httpx/
tasks.description:
31 error_handling variants in httpx/ (4/49 use canonical pattern).
  - _auth.py:82 (Auth.sync_auth_flow)
  - _auth.py:107 (Auth.async_auth_flow)
  - _auth.py:242 (DigestAuth._parse_challenge)
tasks.action: Found 31 variants of the same pattern. Adopt the canonical variant '{"handler_count": 0, "handlers": [], "has_else": false, "has' across: httpx/_auth.py, httpx/_auth.py, httpx/_auth.py (+42 more). Extract a shared helper function and replace inline implementations.
tasks.expected_effect: Reduces pattern variants from 31 to 1 in httpx, lowering PFS signal contribution to the drift score
success_criteria: Pattern variants in httpx reduced to 1 (canonical)
`drift analyze` reports no pattern_fragmentation finding for httpx
All existing tests pass after the change

metadata.deliberate_pattern_risk: May reflect architecture transition or deliberate variation. Review whether variants serve distinct purposes.
